---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

### 📋 Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you are encountering. (e.g., "It's frustrating when...")

### 💡 Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen and how it should work.

### 🔄 Alternatives Considered
A brief description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered, if applicable.

### 🎨 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup designs, or screenshots about the feature request here.
